data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for accommodations management.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the accommodations management feature, specifically regarding extra time and breaks during the exam. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of this feature. The linked use case mentions accommodations management, but lacks specific details or evidence of how this is executed in the system, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or processes for managing accommodations such as extra time and breaks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the accommodations management requirement.
